eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Bingham; Clark; Bonneville; Butte; Lemhi; Jefferson, ID; at 9:43 PM on MAY 25, 2026 Effective until 11:43 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is an activation of the Endangered Missing Person Alert system.  The Bingham County Sheriff's Office is looking for a missing person who was last seen at Birch Creek Campground and is believed to be in danger. He is a 71 year old white male with grey hair blue eyes and a scar on the upper left arm. Authorities say that the missing person may be traveling in a Red 1997 Ford Explorer with idaho plate # 4 B T 9 1 6 U. If seen do not approach and contact authorities. If you have any information on the where abouts of this missing person please contact 9  1  1 immediately.
